s1.title: Ceramic Restorations
s1.desc: Veneers and refractors for flawless aesthetics of your smile.

s2.title: Implantation
s2.desc: Reliable restoration of lost teeth with a lifetime warranty.

s3.title: Root Canal Treatment
s3.desc: Modern endodontic treatment using a microscope.

s4.title: Zirconia Crowns
s4.desc: Durable and aesthetic crowns made of zirconium dioxide.

s5.title: Whitening
s5.desc: Safe professional lightening of tooth enamel.

s6.title: Professional Cleaning
s6.desc: Comprehensive oral hygiene and tartar removal.

s7.title: Restorations
s7.desc: Artistic restoration of the shape and color of teeth.

s9.title: Tooth Extraction
s9.desc: Painless and careful extraction of any complexity.

q1.q: Is it painful to get an implant?
q1.a: The implantation procedure is absolutely painless. We use modern safe anesthetics, thanks to which you will feel nothing.

q2.a: With proper care, ceramic veneers last 15-20 years or more. They do not change color and retain their original shine.

q3.q: Is there a warranty for services?
q3.a: Yes, we provide an official warranty for all types of work.

q4.q: How often should I get my teeth cleaned?
q4.a: We recommend professional oral hygiene every 6 months.

promo.title: The Holy Month of Ramazan is coming!
promo.subtitle: Special offers and updated working hours

t1.name: nastenakikot
t1.text: Thank you so much for your work! It's been about half a year since my tooth restoration and everything holds perfectly, looks very aesthetic and no discomfort.

t2.name: Happy Patient
t2.text: I've been visiting this dentistry for almost a year. I am satisfied with the quality of services and the attitude of the staff.

about.title: Why Yormand?
about.desc: Yormand Dental Clinic — over 9,500 satisfied patients. We provide a full range of dental services using modern equipment and sterile conditions so that your smile always remains flawless.

dikidi.subtitle: Online Booking
dikidi.time: Choose a convenient time, doctor, and service
dikidi.fastDesc: Plan your visit to the dentist online. You can choose a specific specialist, the required procedure, and the most convenient time for you without having to call the clinic.

faq_contact.title: Didn't find the answer to your question?
faq_contact.desc: Leave your contacts, and our doctor will contact you for a detailed consultation.

promo_details.p1: During the holy month of Ramadan, our clinic opens its doors day and night 🌙
promo_details.p2: We will be working 24/7, and besides that, there will be special offers for you every week. Namely:
promo_details.w1_title: Two implants for the price of one 🦷
promo_details.w2_title: Two zirconia crowns for the price of one 🦷
promo_details.w3_title: Extraction of two teeth for the price of one 🦷
promo_details.w4_title: 50% discount on braces installation and orthodontic treatment 🦷
promo_details.rule1: By paying the cost of treatment for one tooth from the three categories above, you get the treatment of another implant absolutely free 🎁
promo_details.rule2: It is important to remember that each promotion is valid for exactly one week and the number of places is limited ❗️
promo_details.rule3: But that's not all! By tradition, you can come to extract your children's milk teeth during the whole month absolutely FREE 🆓
promo_details.rule4: And if you do not have time to visit our clinic this month, you can pay at a special price now, and use the offer later 🙌
